title: July 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 17''' is the 198th day (199th in leap years) of the year, with 167 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Diahann Carroll]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Tim Rose|Timothy M. Rose]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Nancy Giles]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Christopher Corey Smith]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Christian Taylor]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 88|''Star Wars'' (1977) 88]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Billie Lourd]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 3|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 3]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 29]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Larry Keith]] dies.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Collection]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 4|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 4]] published.
*2013 – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 1|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 1]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 3]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars: Journey to Star Wars: The Last Jedi – Captain Phasma (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Journey to Star Wars: The Last Jedi – Captain Phasma'' hardcover]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 34|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 34]] published.
*2019 – [[TIE Fighter 4|''TIE Fighter'' 4]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 48|''Star Wars'' (2020) 48]] published.
